entries.content: transitive verb ① (conflict with) 与…相矛盾 yǔ… xiāng máodùn▸ all the reports contradict each other 所有的报告都相互矛盾 ② (dispute) 反驳 fǎnbó ‹person, statement›
entries.label: A
entries.name: transitive verb

entries.content: intransitive verb 反驳 fǎnbó▸ don't contradict! 不要顶嘴！
entries.label: B
entries.name: intransitive verb
